phrases.intent_en: Ask where to buy entrance tickets
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde puedo comprar las entradas de acceso?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, ¿DOHN-deh PWEH-doh kohm-PRAHR lahs ehn-TRAH-dahs deh ahk-SEH-soh?

likely_response.local: En la taquilla, justo al entrar.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN LAH tah-k-EEL-lah HOO-stoh AHL ehnt-RAHR
likely_response.translation_en: At the ticket office, just upon entering.

responses.english: At the ticket office, just upon entering.
responses.phonetic: EHN LAH tah-k-EEL-lah HOO-stoh AHL ehnt-RAHR
responses.french: En la taquilla, justo al entrar.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Vitoria tomb is
phrases.text_local: ¿Dónde se encuentra la tumba de Francisco de Vitoria?
phrases.pronunciation: DOHN-deh seh en-KWEN-trah lah TOOM-bah deh frahn-SEES-koh deh vee-TOH-ree-ah?

likely_response.local: En el claustro principal, lado derecho.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN EHL klah-OO-stroh preen-thee-PAHL LAH-doh deh-REHTH-oh
likely_response.translation_en: In the main cloister, right side.

responses.english: In the main cloister, right side.
responses.phonetic: EHN EHL klah-OO-stroh preen-thee-PAHL LAH-doh deh-REHTH-oh
responses.french: En el claustro principal, lado derecho.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the main altarpiece is
phrases.text_local: ¿Podría indicarme dónde está el retablo mayor?
phrases.pronunciation: ¿Poh-DREE-ah een-dee-KAHR-meh DOHN-deh eh-STAH el reh-TAH-bloh mah-YOHR?

likely_response.local: Al fondo de la iglesia central.
likely_response.pronunciation: AHL FOHN-doh DEH LAH eeh-leh-SEE-ah thehnt-RAHL
likely_response.translation_en: At the back of the central church.

responses.english: At the back of the central church.
responses.phonetic: AHL FOHN-doh DEH LAH eeh-leh-SEE-ah thehnt-RAHL
responses.french: Al fondo de la iglesia central.

phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿podría indicarme dónde está el claustro?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, ¿poh-DREE-ah een-dee-KAHR-meh DOHN-deh eh-STAH el KLAWS-troh?

likely_response.local: Al fondo del patio, a la derecha.
likely_response.pronunciation: AHL FOHN-doh DEHL pah-TEE-oh AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
likely_response.translation_en: At the back of the courtyard, on the right.

responses.english: At the back of the courtyard, on the right.
responses.phonetic: AHL FOHN-doh DEHL pah-TEE-oh AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
responses.french: Al fondo del patio, a la derecha.
